productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Contest Hi Shoes
description: Style NoteThese stylish Contest Hi shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These high profile shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive high-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Product DetailsLeather and other materials upper for durability and protectionPerorated side panels and toe box for enhanced breathabilityLace-ups for snug FitPadded tongue and built up padded collar with fabric padding for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortBrand name appliquéd on the tongue and printed on the sideAppliqued suede form stripes on the sidescat logo on the heelCushioned insole for all day comfortEVA midsole for greater shock absorptionRubber outsole with horizontal grooves for greater tractionPivot point on the big toe mound and heel for greater 180 degree movementFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet Material and CareLeather and other materialsWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
